Rendering pixel art using cohost CSS

This is Squirrel Girl rendered as HTML5 pixel art using <div>s for the rows and <span>s for the columns! The image is quantized down to a 32-color palette and rows are "compressed" using run-length encoding.

Code is available online and I'll get a live web version running soon.
